---
title: "map"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(metainsight)
con <- setup_load("~/Documents/metainsight_dev/summary_study/Very large.csv", o = "continuous") |>
  setup_configure("Placebo", "random", "MD", "good", 123)

png("forest.png", width = 600, height = 400)
meta::forest(con$freq$netmeta, reference.group = "Placebo", pooled = "random")
dev.off()
```
